description_long: This rifle features a robust, elongated barrel with a matte blue-black finish, complemented by a dark, ergonomic pistol grip and a sturdy stock. The receiver and magazine well are clearly defined, with the magazine protruding slightly beneath the main body. The rifle is equipped with a prominent iron sight system, and the muzzle end appears to have a flash hider or similar device attached. The overall construction suggests a combination of metal and polymer materials, typical of modern tactical rifles. The design is utilitarian, with minimal decorative elements, emphasizing function and durability for urban environments.
description: A matte blue-black tactical rifle with a dark pistol grip, sturdy stock, iron sights, and a flash hider at the muzzle. The design is robust and functional, suited for urban use.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full length of the rifle, including the stock, pistol grip, magazine, and barrel with muzzle device.
description_view_1: Front-angled view highlighting the muzzle, iron sight, and the alignment of the barrel and stock.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displaying the stock, grip, and the magazine well, with the barrel and muzzle device visible.
description_view_3: Rear-angled view focusing on the stock and grip, with the barrel and muzzle device receding into the background.
